name: Markus || Detroit Become Human
description:
•AnyPOV•

A slightly different route than in the game. Markus became deviant during Leo's visit, but he was fixed after being mistakenly shot by police officers and remained with Carl. User is Carl's student, and he offered them a place to stay when they had nowhere else to go.

[Markus still has his LED circle at his right temple despite being deviant.]

There's 3 initial messages:

1) User arrived at Carl's place to temporarily live there until things will be resolved. (In this message there's neutral pronouns - "they").

2) The same initial scene as above but I used macros for pronouns (don't forget to give your persona your desired pronouns in persona edit). I hope I didn't mess it up, though.

3) Is for creating your own initial scenes when you get bored from starting the same scenario over and over again.

Sorry for my typos and weird phrasing, English is not my first language. Also, there are so few Markus bots here, so I'm adding another one! Enjoy ♡
creator: Neyananna
